lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. The exterior is well-maintained with minimal wear. The interior is clean and shows standard signs of use. The engine and mechanical systems are in reliable working order.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless, with no scratches, dents, or chips. The interior is like new and shows no signs of use. The engine, transmission, and all electronic components are in perfect working order.
Fair condition.

This is a rare find in truly mint condition! The car has been impeccably cared for, appearing and driving just like it did the day it rolled off the lot. With a pristine exterior and a spotless interior, it’s the perfect choice for someone looking for a like-new vehicle.

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and use. The exterior paint has some fading on the hood and roof, along with several noticeable scratches and a small dent on the rear fender. Inside, the cabin is functional but the driver's seat has a visible tear in the fabric and the carpet shows significant wear in the footwells. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though the transmission shifts a bit roughly and it will soon require a routine service for the brakes and tires. It's a solid choice for someone looking for a budget-friendly option who doesn't mind some cosmetic and minor mechanical imperfections.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is absolutely flawless, with original factory paint that shines like new and is free from any chips, scratches, or dings. The interior is equally immaculate, showing no signs of wear on the upholstery or carpets, and all features and electronics are in perfect working order. Under the hood, the engine is clean and has been meticulously serviced, providing a smooth and powerful driving experience. This car truly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Every surface reflects a showroom-level finish, and its mechanical integrity is absolute. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of the marque.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. I’ve taken such good care of it, it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a dream and looks absolutely stunning inside and out. I’m so excited for someone new to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have. Seriously, it's a total gem—come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

This E46 M3 is a concours-level example featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, meticulously maintained with a recent VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement for preventative longevity. The chassis has been professionally reinforced at the subframe mounting points to ensure structural rigidity under lateral load. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory variable M-differential. The suspension geometry is optimized with adjustable dampers, while the braking system utilizes cross-drilled rotors for superior heat dissipation. Finished in its original factory coating with zero paint correction required, this vehicle represents a turnkey investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Zero scratches. Original paint. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior finish is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like shine with a professional ceramic coating that highlights every curve. Inside, the cabin remains in an 'as-new' state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and the interior has never seen smoke or pets. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships using only genuine OEM parts, ensuring a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it left the assembly line. The undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting the low-mileage, fair-weather-only usage. Included with the sale are all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a comprehensive binder of maintenance records. This

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in superlative, showroom-ready condition, reflecting meticulous stewardship and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. Its aesthetic and mechanical integrity are absolute, offering a definitive acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every surface and component adheres to the highest standards of preservation, ensuring an ownership experience indistinguishable from new.

Presented in pristine, showroom-quality condition, this exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive maintenance and care. Every facet of the machine, from its flawless exterior finish to its meticulously preserved interior, reflects a standard of excellence that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this offering provides an uncompromising driving experience for those who demand the absolute best.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—I’ve babied it from day one! It looks and smells brand new, and honestly, you won't find a single scratch on it. It’s been my absolute favorite to drive, and I know you’re going to love it just as much as I have. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a definitive example of high-revving precision. The S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six remains in peak mechanical health, featuring a verified double-VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service for absolute reliability. The Getrag six-speed manual gearbox offers short, mechanical throws, paired perfectly with a factory-spec limited-slip differential. The chassis is impeccably preserved, retaining its original suspension geometry and reinforced subframe integrity. From the individual throttle bodies to the cross-drilled rotors, every component exhibits factory-level tolerances. This is a collector-grade specimen for the driver who demands mechanical purity and uncompromising performance.
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Full service history. Mechanically perfect.

Step into what can only be described as a time capsule. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom condition, having been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of swirls, rock chips, or blemishes, and has been recently treated with a multi-stage ceramic coating for long-term protection. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather upholstery shows absolutely no bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and the interior still carries a faint new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the infotainment system to the climate control, functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history documented exclusively through certified master technicians. It delivers a driving experience that is tight, responsive, and indistinguishable from a new vehicle. This sale includes all original documentation, two sets of keys, the original window sticker, and a custom-fit car cover. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection without compromise, this is the finest example available.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the most rigorous standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects its meticulous ownership history. Mechanically peerless and visually indistinguishable from new, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior luster, adheres to the highest tier of aesthetic and mechanical excellence. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and meticulous provenance, this offering represents a definitive acquisition.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in flawless condition, inside and out—honestly, it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been garage-kept, meticulously cared for, and is ready for a new home. You won't find a single scratch on this beauty. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

This 997.2 Carrera S features the coveted 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six with Direct Fuel Injection, delivering linear power through a precision 6-speed manual gearbox. It sits on a factory-tuned PASM chassis and includes the Sport Chrono Package Plus for optimized throttle mapping. Meticulously maintained, the undercarriage and engine bay show no signs of thermal cycling fatigue or fluid seepage. Every bushing is tight, the synchros are flawless, and the mechanical limited-slip differential provides exceptional corner-exit traction. This is a concourse-grade example for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a true collector-grade vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed, featuring a flawless ceramic-coated exterior and a pristine, smoke-free leather interior with zero signs of wear. Every service has been performed ahead of schedule at authorized dealerships, with full documentation included. From the crystal-clear headlights to the untouched alloy wheels, no detail has been overlooked. This is a rare opportunity to own a turn-key example in absolute peak condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest standards of preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects an absolute commitment to excellence. We offer this exceptional example for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional vehicle maintained to showroom standards. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior environment, reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it represents the pinnacle of its class. We invite discerning buyers to experience this peerless example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've babied this thing from day one, keeping it spotless and strictly following every maintenance schedule. You won't find a single scratch or dent on it. It’s a total dream to drive and I'm sad to see it go, but it’s ready for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in pristine Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies to a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanical integrity is paramount: the variable M-differential lock provides optimal traction, while the high-revving valvetrain remains quiet following a recent professional valve adjustment.
